name: Contemporary Literary Fiction Ontology
description: Entity types for contemporary literary fiction — psychological depth, social dynamics, thematic resonance

entityTypes.name: PsychologicalState
entityTypes.description: A character's mental/emotional state at a point in the narrative

entityTypes.name: Theme
entityTypes.description: A thematic element woven through the narrative

consistencyRules.description: Flag characters with unresolved psychological states at narrative end
consistencyRules.query: MATCH (c:Character)-[:EXPERIENCES]->(p:PsychologicalState) WHERE p.resolved = false AND p.chapter > 20 RETURN c.name, p.emotion as unresolved

consistencyRules.description: Themes should appear in at least 3 chapters to be considered developed
consistencyRules.query: MATCH (t:Theme) WHERE size(t.recurrences) < 3 RETURN t.description as underdeveloped_theme
